name: Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month tool
description: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month, high customer churn causes lost revenue. We provide a customer churn analysis and retention system instead of manual tracking of customer interactions and sales data.

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of customer interactions and sales data
